service.description: Post a Substack Note (short-form) via the private API. Notes are account-level: they go to https://substack.com, not the publication host. Base URL overridable with system property growerp.substack.notesBaseUrl (for tests).

Add one email as a free subscriber to the publication. This is the ONLY place that knows the subscriber endpoint. Primary: the public embed signup endpoint POST {publicationUrl}/api/v1/free (no auth, most stable). Fallback if that breaks: authenticated POST {publicationUrl}/api/v1/publication/import with the sid cookie.

Idempotently add one email as a Substack free subscriber and record the result in SubstackSubscriberSync. Skips test data (example.com) and already-SYNCED emails; FAILED rows are retried. Skips silently when no enabled SUBSTACK PlatformConfiguration exists (dev/test instances).

service-call.name: store#growerp.marketing.SubstackSubscriberSync
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, emailAddress: emailAddress, tenantPartyId: tenantPartyId, status: resultStatus, errorMessage: errorMessage, syncedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Backend job: add everyone who tried GrowERP as a Substack free subscriber. Every real signup creates a trial Subscription in the GROWERP tenant (externalSubscriptionId = the new tenant's ownerPartyId) with a customer party carrying the admin email — so this job only scans GROWERP-owned data. Idempotent via SubstackSubscriberSync; per-row errors never abort the batch.

log.message: Substack subscriber sync: ${syncedCount} synced, ${skippedCount} skipped, ${failedCount} failed

service.description: Fetch comments (incl. restacks) for one published Substack post via GET {publicationUrl}/api/v1/post/{externalPostId}/comments and flatten the nested reply tree.

Backend job: pull comments and restacks for recently published Substack posts (all tenants) into SocialEngagement, deduped on externalEngagementId. Likes are not collected — Substack only exposes aggregate reaction counts, not reactor identities.

log.message: Substack engagement fetch failed for post ${post.postId}: ${commentsResult.errorMessage}

service-call.name: create#growerp.marketing.SocialEngagement
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: post.ownerPartyId, postId: post.postId, platform: 'SUBSTACK', engagementType: comment.type == 'restack' ? 'SHARE' : 'COMMENT', userName: comment.userName, userProfileUrl: comment.userProfileUrl, externalEngagementId: comment.externalId, note: comment.body, status: 'NEW', createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

log.message: Substack engagement collect: ${newEngagementCount} new, ${checkedPostCount} posts checked, ${failedCount} failed
